blittermib. Pixelperfect MIB browser
Self-hosted — your MIBs never leave your server.
blittermib.

Browse SNMP MIBs, beautifully.

Drop your MIB files here:

/var/lib/blittermib/mibs

blittermib watches the directory and parses new MIBs as they appear. Standard IETF and IANA MIBs are loaded by default.

blittermib · runs entirely on your server Made with AI and ❤️ for Open Source in Europe · About Me · Imprint · Privacy
